## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSessionBase.setFillingSlot() method

Sets or updates a filling slot. Creates/updates filling session if recipe slot.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setFillingSlot(slotId: SlotId, choice: {
        type: 'recipe';
        fillingId: FillingId;
    } | {
        type: 'ingredient';
        ingredientId: IngredientId;
    }): Result<EditingSession | undefined>;
```

</td><td>

Recipe or ingredient choice


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;EditingSession \| undefined&gt;

`Success` with the new or updated filling session, or `undefined` for ingredient slots; or `Failure`
